title: Opus 5: The Upcoming Anthology and Its Competition
description: Opus 5, an anthology, is rumored to be announced soon, with GPT-5.6 and Chinese AI as its competitors.

sources.title: アンソロピック「Claude Opus 5」明日にも発表か、GPT-5.6や中国AIに対抗 焦点は？
Fable 5、20日以降もMaxプランではサブスク提供 Proは従量制に
「1Mトークンのコンテキスト窓」——Claude Opus 5、複数のリーカーが示す発売間近のサイン

sections.heading: Opus 5 Announcement
paragraphs: According to 'ビジネス+IT', the anthology 'Claude Opus 5' is expected to be announced tomorrow.

sections.heading: Competition
paragraphs: 'ビジネス+IT' reports that Opus 5 will be competing with GPT-5.6 and Chinese AI.

sections.heading: Fable 5 Subscription Plans
paragraphs: Impress Watch reports that Fable 5 will continue to provide subscription services under the Max plan after the 20th, while the Pro plan will switch to a pay-as-you-go system.

sections.heading: Indicators of Imminent Release
paragraphs: shiritomo mentions that multiple leakers have indicated signs of the upcoming release of 'Claude Opus 5', focusing on the '1M token context window'.

faq.a: Opus 5 is an anthology that is expected to be announced soon, as reported by 'ビジネス+IT'.

faq.q: Who are the competitors of Opus 5?
faq.a: Opus 5 will compete with GPT-5.6 and Chinese AI, according to 'ビジネス+IT'.

faq.q: What are the subscription plans for Fable 5?
faq.a: Impress Watch reports that Fable 5 will continue to provide subscription services under the Max plan and switch to a pay-as-you-go system for the Pro plan.
